overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a character walking through a dystopian city street during an intense orange sandstorm at night. The character navigates through crowds of pedestrians along a fenced sidewalk and crosses a debris-strewn intersection with extremely poor visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with industrial fencing during sandstorm

agents.ego_description: walking along a fenced sidewalk following a group of pedestrians through heavy orange smog

entered.detail: tall metal security fence with wooden plank base running along the sidewalk
dark colored sedan parked along the curb
tall modern street lamp with orange glowing light

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a third-person perspective walking along a narrow concrete sidewalk bordered by a metal fence on the right and parked cars on the left. The visibility is extremely poor due to an orange sandstorm. Street lamps cast an eerie glow through the haze as the character follows a crowd of pedestrians forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with aircraft wreckage visible in distance

events.description: exits fenced sidewalk and enters open intersection area
crossing the asphalt intersection with other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at an intersection while navigating through scattered pedestrians

notable_agents.action: character wearing tank top and red bag walking toward camera then passing by

entered.detail: large crashed aircraft wreckage looming in the orange haze
palm tree bending in the storm winds

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the enclosed sidewalk to a wide open intersection. The metal fence falls away revealing a large crashed aircraft wreckage in the distance through the orange smog. Palm trees sway violently in the wind as the character crosses the asphalt intersection, passing concrete barriers and other pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: open street approaching wreckage with damaged buildings

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the intersection toward the wreckage with other pedestrians

entered.detail: damaged multi-story building with exposed structure

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the open intersection, with the crashed wreckage now appearing closer and more detailed ahead. A ruined building becomes visible on the right side. The crowd disperses slightly as they move across the debris-strewn asphalt, with palm trees continuing to sway in the heavy storm winds.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic city sidewalk that gradually opens into a wide, debris-strewn intersection during a violent sandstorm. It begins by trailing a crowd of pedestrians along a narrow concrete path, hemmed in by a metal fence and parked cars under the eerie glow of street lamps filtering through thick orange haze. As the character moves forward, the fence falls away and the scene expands into a vast asphalt intersection where palm trees sway violently in the wind. The camera then pushes further into the open space, passing concrete barriers as the orange smog reveals the looming silhouette of a crashed aircraft wreckage and a ruined building. Finally, the view clears slightly to show the wreckage in greater detail as the character and the dispersing crowd navigate the wreckage-filled street.
